name: Mint Wafers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Peppermint, spearmint, or Wintergreen extract
recipeInstructions:
Cover cookie sheet with waxed paper. Mix powdered sugar and sweetened condensed milk until smooth. Add food coloring if desired. Knead in peppermint extract until a creamy mixture forms. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls. Place the balls about 1 inch apart on the cookie sheet. Flatten each ball with a fork to about 1/4-inch thickness. Let stand at room temperature for about 1 hour or until firm.
Turn candies over and let stand another 1 hour or until tops are firm. Store mints in an airtight container. Makes about 8 dozen candies, each containing approximately 25 calories.
